channel.title: Selvin PaulRaj K - Full-Stack Developer Portfolio
channel.description: Portfolio updates, projects, and insights from Selvin PaulRaj K - Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer specializing in MERN Stack, Next.js, and enterprise automation.

item.title: AI Calculator - Full-Stack AI Drawing Calculator
item.description: Developed a full-stack AI calculator with Next.js 15 and TypeScript with Clerk, enabling drawing with AI for instant responsive calculations via Google AI's Gemini model.
item.dc:creator: Selvin PaulRaj K

item.title: TroothView - AI Image Trustworthiness Verification
item.description: Created a React project that allows users to input photos, uses a Gradio AI model to confirm their trustworthiness, and displays the results in a doughnut chart.
item.dc:creator: Selvin PaulRaj K

item.title: Speed Typing - Animation-Rich Typing Test App
item.description: Created an animation-rich React and TypeScript application with comprehensive testing using Framer Motion, Jest, and Tailwind CSS.
item.dc:creator: Selvin PaulRaj K

item.title: Phishing Detection System - Browser Extension + ML Backend
item.description: Browser extension for detecting phishing websites using machine learning, with a FastAPI backend for ML model inference.
item.dc:creator: Selvin PaulRaj K

item.title: Copy-ME - Real-Time Text Sharing Application
item.description: Copy-ME is a minimalistic, real-time web application designed to facilitate instant text sharing across multiple devices using WebSockets.
item.dc:creator: Selvin PaulRaj K
